QUICK LINKS Grievance Redressal Committee Anti Ragging Committee Student Welfare Counsellor Committee Anti Ragging Committee SC/ST Cell Contact STUDY IN INDIA X TNEACODE 2739 Campus tour Admission 2025 TNEACODE 2739 SEED FUNDS 1Cr+ SEED FUNDS 20+ RESEARCH PROJECTS 9 ADVANCED RESEARCH CENTRES 50+ ADVANCED RESEARCH CENTRES PUBLICATIONS SEED FUNDING Seed funds provided as initial financial support for faculty members within the Institution

. These funds are often allocated to kickstart innovative research initiatives, explore new areas of inquiry, or support early-stage projects that may eventually attract external funding. Seed fund is granted through an internal evaluation process. These funds can cover expenses such as equipment, supplies and other project-related costs. Seed funding provided plays a crucial role in fostering a culture of research and innovation, encouraging faculty to pursue novel ideas and contribute to knowledge creation in their respective fields. It also helps researchers generate preliminary data or proof-of-concept results that can strengthen their proposals when applying for larger grants from external funding agencies.
